status_notes: Acquired by Compaq in 1998; Compaq subsequently acquired by HP in 2002. DEC brand retired.
OMG remains active as the standards body for CORBA and UML among other specifications.
Microsoft remains independently active; OLE/COM evolved into COM+ and .NET component model.
Logica merged with / acquired by CGI Group (Canada) in August 2012 for £1.7 billion. Logica brand retired March 2013.
EDS acquired by Hewlett-Packard for $13.9 billion; deal announced May 2008 and closed August 26, 2008.

Protosoft (Paradigm Plus) acquired by Platinum Technology for $40 million in November 1995 — just months after this study was published. Platinum Technology itself acquired by Computer Associates in March 1999 for $3.5 billion.
Tandem acquired by Compaq in 1997. Compaq subsequently acquired by HP in 2002.
Aberdeen Group remains active as an IT industry analyst and research firm.
Small professional services firm mentioned as an ObjectBroker partner; current status not determined.
Small professional services firm mentioned as an ObjectBroker partner; current status not determined.
European service partner for ObjectBroker; current status not determined.
